title: Find My Device - Warning dialog for Play button
scenario: Find My Device warning dialog does not match Figma design when tapping Play button on connected headset
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on a connected headset to open Device Settings.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Find My Device.
Tap the Play button on the Find My Device screen.
Observe the warning dialog that appears.
expected: The warning dialog matches the Figma design (correct layout, text, buttons, and styling).
